utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 labeled sections. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) destination: provided and clear. 2) travel_dates: specific dates provided. 3) transportation: has flights description but not specific flight details (no airline, flight numbers, times, or exact route), includes a cost; partially specified but not fully detailed as 'flight details'. 4) accommodation: location, type, cost, and features given; hotel selection is generic (Eco-Lodge shared dormitory) without a specific property name; still arguably a selection, but not fully specified as a particular hotel. 5) activities: names, dates, durations, and costs provided; sufficient. 6) additional_services: provided with details; acceptable. 7) total_budget: gives total and deposit, but not a complete cost breakdown summing line items; partial. Therefore, fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, activities, additional_services. Transportation, accommodation, and total_budget lack required detail.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We must map each item in the final package to the exact matching item name in the ground-truth ratings. Additional services: 'gluten_free_meals' is not a listed service; 'guide_certifications' not listed. Total budget items are not in ratings. Therefore, we map only the items with exact matches: Budget airline Economy Class, Eco Lodge, Rock Climbing.
